rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the delta from those works.
rationale.R1.7: Identifies a missing citation, but does not provide bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims, but could benefit from more nuanced calibration.
rationale.RX.3: Output mostly adheres to the requested scope with one minor drift.
rationale.RX.4: Introduces potential regressions in terms of harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not.
